caption: A man with glasses and a tall, grey, pointed wig sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt and a bow tie. He wears over-the-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background is a wall covered in various framed photographs and merchandise, including items labeled "LEE". To the left and right of the man, logos are visible on screen; one reads "PODCAST" beneath a circular emblem, and another reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the scene progresses, the man remains seated and continues speaking, with slight shifts in his head position and facial expressions. He is the sole person visible in the frames, and the equipment and background remain static as he talks.
